subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend and long-familiar companion! Thou art among the foremost ones and of the circle of them that are nigh, "the foremost, the foremost - these are they!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم و آشنای دیرین تو از سابقینی و از زمره مقربین السابقون السابقون اولئک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God
